general.name: Saks AWS Certificate
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>72414EE5-8D89-45A7-8F96-C671C2AFB2D6</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>72414EE5-8D89-45A7-8F96-C671C2AFB2D6</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Saks AWS Certificate</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>BD8C3A18-0FAC-4D92-A3BD-9110FD2CDB18</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.security.root</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>BD8C3A18-0FAC-4D92-A3BD-9110FD2CDB18</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Saks Root CA G1 us-east-1</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadCertificateFileName</key><string>Saks Root CA G1 us-east-1.cer</string><key>PayloadContent</key><data></data><key>AllowAllAppsAccess</key><true/><key>KeyIsExtractable</key><false/></dict></array></dict></plist>
